## Summary

What does this PR do? Link the related Issue if one exists ("Closes #123").

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Changes Made

Brief bullet list of what changed and why.

## Testing

Describe how you tested this. If tests were added or updated, list them.

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or secrets
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables were added
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` still accurate for my change area
